apple._comment_teamId: TODO(setup): fill the 10-character Apple Developer Team ID, or set VIBEZ1_APPLE_TEAM_ID in CI/deploy. Find it at https://developer.apple.com/account -> Membership -> Team ID.

android._comment_sha256CertFingerprints: TODO(setup): run `keytool -list -v -keystore <path-to-release.keystore> -alias <alias>` (typically the keystore referenced by RELEASE_STORE_FILE in apps/mobile/android/app/build.gradle) and paste the SHA256 fingerprint here, colon-separated, uppercase (e.g. `AA:BB:CC:...`), or set VIBEZ1_ANDROID_SHA256_CERT_FINGERPRINTS as a comma-separated list in CI/deploy. For Play App Signing, include the upload-key fingerprint AND the Play-managed app-signing key fingerprint from Play Console -> Setup -> App integrity -> App signing.
